consumers.current_behavior: SQLModel table attesting a proposal_id with a human decision. No version fields.
consumers.authority_effect: Defines DB shape; no execution authority.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep for historical data. New version-bound writes use DecisionRecord/DecisionValidity.

consumers.current_behavior: ReviewEvent carries optional attestation_ref linking back to attestation.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep attestation_ref as historical compatibility link.

consumers.current_behavior: Docstring: 'attestation stays the decision of record'.
consumers.recommended_change: Replace with: 'Attestation is historical review evidence. DecisionRecord captures version-bound decisions.'

consumers.current_behavior: Decision enum (approved/rejected/referred) used by Attestation.decision.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep for historical rows. Separate enum may be needed for DecisionRecord.

consumers.current_behavior: Attestation in StateCoreRecord union for write_records.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep. Add DecisionRecord when available.

consumers.current_behavior: Creates Attestation row + receipt + ReceiptIndex. Binds proposal_id only.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep operational. Add create_decision_record for version-bound writes.

consumers.current_behavior: Return type: attestation, proposal, receipt_ref, approved_is_not_execution_authorization, execution_allowed.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep for receipt compatibility.

consumers.current_behavior: create_governed_review_event includes optional attestation_ref for linkage.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep attestation_ref for historical linkage.

consumers.current_behavior: POST /proposals/{id}/attest. Active legacy-unbound write surface.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep for existing consumers. Tag legacy after DecisionRecord endpoint exists.

consumers.current_behavior: open_for_review = not attestations. Binary review-completion gate.
consumers.recommended_change: Replace with DecisionValidity query. Dual-read during transition.

consumers.current_behavior: API model exposes open_for_review derived from attestation existence.
consumers.recommended_change: Add decision_validity field. Dual-read during transition.

consumers.current_behavior: Lifecycle state 'completed' derived from attestation presence.
consumers.recommended_change: Derive from DecisionValidity. Dual-source during transition.

consumers.current_behavior: status=open|attested filter uses attestation presence.
consumers.recommended_change: Include decision_validity_status. Keep labels for backward compat.

consumers.current_behavior: review_state from attestation presence (human_attestation_recorded vs pending_human_review).
consumers.recommended_change: Derive from DecisionValidity.

consumers.current_behavior: Counts open current proposal revisions with a correlated SQL existence query over terminal attestations.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep the aggregate query aligned with attestation_closes_current_review semantics.
test_implications: Current, stale, legacy, and absent attestations must produce the same open count as the canonical review semantics.

consumers.current_behavior: Builds attested_ids set. Proposals in attested_ids get queue status 'reviewed'.
consumers.recommended_change: Replace attested_ids with DecisionValidity query.

consumers.current_behavior: Queue status = 'reviewed' when proposal in attested_ids.
consumers.recommended_change: Replace with DecisionValidity status check.

consumers.current_behavior: Merges Attestation + ReviewEvent into timeline. Historical evidence.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep as historical evidence. Add DecisionRecord entries when available.

consumers.current_behavior: open_for_review from attested_ids. Per-item queue classification.
consumers.recommended_change: Derive from DecisionValidity. Combine both during transition.

consumers.current_behavior: Excludes attested proposals from duplicate detection.
consumers.recommended_change: Replace attested_ids filter with DecisionValidity check.

consumers.current_behavior: Lists 'human_attestation' as blocked transition.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep transition name. Future may use 'decision_record'.

consumers.current_behavior: non_claims: 'Human review is required before any decision of record.'
consumers.recommended_change: Rephrase to distinguish historical attestation from DecisionRecord.

consumers.current_behavior: Docstring: 'Attestation stays the decision of record.'
consumers.recommended_change: Replace with: 'Attestation is historical review evidence.'

consumers.current_behavior: Two non_claims tuples contain 'decision of record'. General authority boundary, not Attestation-specific.
consumers.recommended_change: Align with AUT3/DecisionRecord terminology when available.

consumers.current_behavior: 'attestation is decision of record, not execution.'
consumers.recommended_change: Replace with: 'Attestation is historical evidence. DecisionRecord is canonical.'

consumers.current_behavior: Queries Proposal+Attestation, removes attested proposals, supplies open_review_count.
consumers.recommended_change: Use DecisionValidity for current review state. Preserve historical Attestation evidence.

consumers.current_behavior: Computes open/attested/approved/rejected counts from Attestation. Uses latest Attestation as period decision.
consumers.recommended_change: Preserve historical Attestation counts. Expose DecisionRecord/DecisionValidity counts separately.

consumers.current_behavior: Queries Proposal and Attestation, constructs attested proposal IDs, removes attested proposals from Agent open-proposals context. Uses Attestation existence as open/closed gate for agent context packs.
consumers.recommended_change: Derive open/closed from DecisionValidity. Dual-read during transition.

consumers.current_behavior: API reference documenting attestation endpoint semantics.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep. Add DecisionRecord endpoint documentation alongside.

consumers.current_behavior: Documents 'human_attestation' lifecycle state. 'Should not become a human decision of record yet.'
consumers.recommended_change: Keep. Add DecisionValidity lifecycle states alongside.

consumers.current_behavior: Renders attestation list on proposal detail. Historical display.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep. Add DecisionRecord display section when available.

consumers.current_behavior: Attestation form POSTs to /attest. Active write surface.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep for backward compat. Add DecisionRecord form when available.

consumers.current_behavior: Merged timeline with attestation entries. Historical display.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep. Add DecisionRecord entries as separate timeline type.

consumers.current_behavior: Proves the dashboard uses aggregate SQL and preserves current-revision attestation semantics.
consumers.recommended_change: Retain parity coverage whenever proposal revision or attestation binding changes.
test_implications: Dashboard open counts distinguish stale from current revision attestations.

consumers.current_behavior: Tests agent draft/attestation lifecycle.
consumers.recommended_change: Extend with dual-read tests when DecisionRecord exists.

consumers.current_behavior: Tests Attestation serialization round-trips. Locks current schema.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep. Add DecisionRecord serialization tests separately.

consumers.current_behavior: Tests risk classification using Attestation decision state.
consumers.recommended_change: Review whether risk classification should use DecisionRecord.

consumers.current_behavior: Asserts Attestation existence produces open_count=1, attested_count=1, approved_count=1. Locks compute_annual_review's use of Attestation as period decision truth.
consumers.recommended_change: When DecisionRecord exists, add tests verifying both Attestation and DecisionRecord counts. Existing test must continue to pass.

consumers.current_behavior: Registers attestation write in governance write registry.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep. Add DecisionRecord entry when available.

consumers.current_behavior: Treats only approved/rejected attestations bound to the current proposal receipt as review-closing; deferred and stale evidence remain non-terminal.
consumers.authority_effect: Controls review-open projections only; grants no execution authority.
consumers.recommended_change: Preserve as the compatibility gate until DecisionValidity becomes authoritative.
test_implications: Deferred and stale attestations must leave review open.

consumers.current_behavior: Adds explicit proposal-version binding and stale state to historical attestation reads.
consumers.authority_effect: Read projection only; grants no execution authority.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep explicit staleness until the DecisionRecord read model replaces the compatibility view.
test_implications: Restart replay and stale rendering require browser coverage.

consumers.current_behavior: Resolves each attestation against authoritative ProposalVersion lineage and marks unbound or superseded evidence stale.
consumers.authority_effect: Read projection only; grants no execution authority.
consumers.recommended_change: Retain until DecisionValidity supplies the same fail-closed projection.

consumers.current_behavior: Proves confirm/reject/defer persistence, version binding, stale rejection, read-only denial, persistence failure, and loopback confinement.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep as the deterministic backend acceptance layer alongside the browser journey.
test_implications: Must remain in the default unittest gate.

consumers.current_behavior: Reconstructs canonical AttestationCreateResponse from the uniquely mutation-bound Attestation row, canonical attestation receipt, and bound Proposal snapshot.
consumers.authority_effect: No execution authority; recovery-only typed API contract.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep as typed recovery-only API contract.
test_implications: Must remain fail-closed when binding evidence is invalid.

consumers.current_behavior: Reconstructs the canonical content hash a ReviewEvent writer would produce, including historical attestation_ref compatibility link.
consumers.authority_effect: No decision authority; compatibility reference link only.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep as compatibility link.
test_implications: Must consistently produce the same hash as the route writer.

consumers.current_behavior: Verifies the uniquely mutation-bound ReviewEvent, canonical receipt, content hash and optional historical attestation_ref, then reconstructs the canonical response.
consumers.authority_effect: No execution authority; recovery-only typed API contract with compatibility reference.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep as typed recovery-only API contract with compatibility reference.
test_implications: Must remain fail-closed when binding evidence is invalid.

consumers.current_behavior: Proves typed attestation recovery after simulated terminal write failure.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep as typed recovery contract test.
test_implications: Must remain in focused test suite.

consumers.current_behavior: Proves fail-closed behavior when attestation receipt binding is tampered.
consumers.recommended_change: Keep as fail-closed contract test.
test_implications: Must remain in focused test suite.
